chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.10 of 2026 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.135/2026 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.148/2026 06.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel states that this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Asif
